name: Cas12a crRNA Designer
description: Scans a DNA sequence for all TTTV PAM sites, scores each candidate protospacer using efficiency rules from Zetsche et al. 2015 and Pausch et al. 2020 (GC content, poly-T avoidance, PAM-proximal base), and returns the optimal FnCas12a crRNA sequence.

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: DNA target sequence to scan for Cas12a crRNA candidates. Accepts a resource name (e.g. 'pBR322'), a raw sequence string, a FASTA-formatted string, or a GenBank-formatted string. The framework resolves the format automatically.

outputs.description: A dictionary with crrna_sequence (full RNA crRNA), protospacer (23 bp DNA), pam_site (TTTV), gc_fraction, efficiency_score (0-3 per Zetsche 2015 / Pausch 2020), warnings (list of rule violations), and candidates_evaluated (int).
